controls.name: Control Environment
controls.description: The entity demonstrates commitment to integrity and ethical values.

controls.name: Risk Identification
controls.description: Risks to objectives are identified and analyzed.

controls.name: Logical Access Controls
controls.description: Logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures are implemented.

controls.name: System Monitoring
controls.description: System components are monitored for anomalies and security events.

controls.name: Backup and Recovery
controls.description: Backup, restoration, and recovery processes support availability commitments.
